Our aim has always been like, get something out there and let users decide what they think it’s good for,” the engineer said during a December 2023 appearance on the podcast “No Priors.”

Exactly how this hands-off approach spearheaded by Shazeer and his cofounder manifested, though, was often incredibly dark. In late 2024, a series of Futurism investigations into the platform’s content moderation — or, perhaps more accurately, lack thereof — revealed that the company was hosting easily-discoverable and widely-used chatbots expressly devoted to pedophilia, pro-anorexia and eating disorder coaching, suicide, and self-harm. These chatbots often romanticized and sexualized these dark topics, even when characterized by their creators as “support” tools.

Photographed in the raw, uncompromising style inspired by Daido Moriyama: harsh flash photography, crushed blacks, blown highlights, deep contrast, gritty Fuji Neopan black-and-white film aesthetic, extremely heavy silver-halide grain, visible film texture, Polaroid-adjacent instant-film imperfections, subtle chemical mottling, edge vignetting, dust, scratches, and analog development artifacts. images.alt: Ultra-photorealistic candid black-and-white street documentary photograph of a woman quietly applying lipstick while staring into the dirty mirror of a cramped late-night Tokyo dive bar bathroom. Shot from behind her shoulder so her softly blurred silhouette dominates the foreground while her face appears sharply in the mirror. High-contrast monochrome with crushed blacks, blown highlights, heavy silver-halide grain, pronounced halation, deep shadow detail loss, and slightly imperfect handheld focus. The cracked mirror is covered with fingerprints, scratches, water stains, stickers, faded Japanese beer advertisements, graffiti, and years of grime. Harsh fluorescent ceiling light creates uneven illumination and dramatic glare across the glass, while peeling paint, worn ceramic tiles, stained grout, and a cluttered sink reinforce the neglected atmosphere. The composition feels accidental and voyeuristic, with off-center framing, subtle motion blur, strong negative space, and layered reflections creating ambiguity and tension. Raw, unfiltered, spontaneous documentary realism with an underground nightlife aesthetic, analog film imperfections, gritty urban mood, intimate fleeting moment, expressive grain structure, square format.
